result.stdout:
Description:
  SpToolkit stored procedure code generator

Usage:
  SpToolkit.Generator.Cli [options]

Options:
  -c, --config <config>        Path to sptoolkit.json config file [default: sptoolkit.json]
  --connection <connection>    Connection string (overrides config file)
  -o, --output <output>        Output directory for generated files (overrides config file)
  -n, --namespace <namespace>  C# namespace for generated classes (overrides config file)
  -s, --schemas <schemas>      Schemas to include, space-separated (overrides config file)
  -e, --exclude <exclude>      Stored procedure names to exclude (overrides config file)
  -w, --wrapper <wrapper>      Wrapper class name (overrides config file, default: AppStoredProcedures)
  --dry-run                    Print resolved configuration and exit without writing files
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
  --version                    Show version information
